title: cryptantha intermedia var. hendersonii
intro: Cryptantha intermedia var. hendersonii is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Cryptantha intermedia plant, a flowering perennial native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cryptantha intermedia var. hendersonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe wounds, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, and are often used to treat minor cuts and scrapes, as well as to promote wound healing.
